revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q17229037}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] [[Category:Has wikidata]] [[Category:History of Kumagaya, Saitama]] [[Category:Kofun of Saitama prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kumagaya-bunkazai.jp/museum/jousetu/bunkazai/281bunka.htm Takane Cave Tomb Tomb] - Kumagaya Digital Museum

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q17229037]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:44, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kumagaya-bunkazai.jp/museum/jousetu/bunkazai/281bunka.htm Takane Cave Tomb Tomb] - Kumagaya Digital Museum

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Takane Cave Tomb Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Takane Yokoanabo Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Takane Yokoanabo Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kumagaya-bunkazai.jp/museum/jousetu/bunkazai/281bunka.htm Takane Yokoanabo Tomb] - Kumagaya Digital Museum

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Takane Yokoanabo Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}

These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:高根横穴墓群]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|36.09605555555556|N|139.34105555555556|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} '''Takane Yokoanabo Tomb Group''' (高根横穴墓群) is an archaeological site consisting of rock-cut tombs from the [[Kofun period]] located in [[Kumagaya City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. These tombs were carved into a tuff rock formation near the summit of Takane Mountain's northern slope, at an altitude of approximately 89 meters. While only one tomb (Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1) is currently open, it is believed that several other tombs remain buried in the surrounding area. The site was designated as a Historic Site of [[Kōnan Town]] on January 20, 1997.
* '''Takane Mountain Tomb No. 1''' ** Entrance width: 2.5 meters ** Entrance height: 1.5 meters ** Depth: 4 meters ** No artifacts have been investigated or identified from this tomb.
== References == * Hiroshi Shiono, *Saitama no Kofun: Osato*, Sakitama Publishing, 2004. == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|1=list of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426533}}
